questions.question: Explain the main difference between flow-oriented and state-oriented modeling approaches in requirement modeling. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the key aspects of each approach

questions.question: Describe the advantages of using flow-oriented modeling in software engineering. How does it help in identifying system requirements?
questions.hint: Emphasize the benefits of flow-oriented modeling

questions.question: Analyze the flow-oriented modeling process and its components. Identify the role of each component in the modeling process.
questions.hint: Focus on the detailed explanation of flow-oriented modeling process
